title: bouncy-qq
description: a crowd-pleasing filipino dish that is both earthy and bouncy-qq, featuring the zest of lime and the warmth of infuse-oil, all while being ayurvedic-rajasic-friendly
instructions: in a large pan, heat 2 tablespoons of infuse-oil over medium heat.
add the minced garlic and sauté for 1 minute until fragrant.
add the chopped onion and sauté for another 2 minutes until softened.
add the grated ginger and sauté for 1 minute until aromatic.
add the fish sauce, lime juice, coconut milk, cumin, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
add the taro leaves and gently stir to coat with the sauce.
reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
serve hot and garnished with fresh cilantro, if desired.
